⚡ [performance improvement] optimize planetary data extraction (#72)

* ⚡ [performance improvement] optimize planetary data extraction

Optimized `extract_refined_data.py` by:
1. Combining two separate `for row in sheet` loops into a single pass.
2. Replacing repetitive list comprehensions with a single set creation per row for $O(1)$ value lookups.

Measured improvement: ~49% speed boost on simulated data.
Verified correctness: Results match the original implementation exactly.

commit.message:
Build PetTrack MVP — full-stack pet adoption management system (#2)

* Initial plan

* Add complete PetTrack MVP application

- Next.js 16 app with App Router, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Prisma v5 schema with Pet, Location, Tag, User, PetTag, PetPhoto, PetLocationHistory models
- Credential-based JWT authentication with bcrypt password hashing
- proxy.ts for route protection (Next.js 16 convention)
- Public homepage with pet grid, search and filter
- Public pet detail page
- Admin dashboard with summary metrics
- Admin pets CRUD with tag/photo management
- Admin locations CRUD
- Admin tags CRUD with color support
- Server actions for all mutations
- Prisma seed script with realistic demo data (12 pets, 5 locations, 10 tags)
- Custom UI components (Button, Input, Label, Card, Badge, Table, Select, Textarea)
- Comprehensive README with setup instructions

Co-authored-by: keen5336 <2243916+keen5336@users.noreply.github.com>
Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/keen5336/angelofhope/sessions/60ad7e3c-78c7-47a6-a02e-a3e6c0457e36

commit.message:
refactor: remove transcript collection, restore core playlist crawler

- Remove all transcript-related functions and CLI flags
  (fetch_transcript, crawl_transcripts, fetch_transcript_ytdlp,
   Selenium transcript helpers, _timestamp_to_seconds, etc.)
- Remove transcript dependencies from requirements.txt
  (youtube-transcript-api, yt-dlp)
- Delete transcript test files (test_fetch.py, transcript_check.py)
- Add --limit option for per-playlist video cap
- Update README: correct PowerShell syntax, add --limit docs,
  add section on why transcript collection failed and future options

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: サマリーAPIのカテゴリ別集計を実装 (#14)

ExpenseService#getSummaryのカテゴリ集計ロジックを修正。
- expenses リストを Expense#getCategory() でグループ化
- カテゴリごとに合計金額を算出
- percentage は (カテゴリ合計 / 全体合計) * 100 で計算（小数点1位まで）
- total が 0 の場合は percentage を 0.0 にする
- 「未分類」固定のコメントと実装を削除

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(api): enforce squad number immutability on PUT (#529)

Add a mismatch guard in put_async: if squad_number in the request
body does not match the path parameter, return HTTP 400 Bad Request.
The path parameter is the authoritative source of identity on PUT.

Document the single-model design decision in PlayerRequestModel:
one model intentionally covers both POST and PUT, with per-operation
differences handled at the route layer.

450 improve performance of hot paths and bump preferred sprouts version (#451)

* improve performance when checking if a component area has an opaque gradient or noise

* only intern the 'LayerRenderConf' inside the 'LayerCache' when caching makes sense to avoid interning, which produces a lot of expensive hash code computation

* improve style renderer hot path performance slightly by reducing redundant color instantiation

* avoid array allocation for all layer constants as 'values()' always returns a defensive copy

- Add src/version.ts as single source of truth for game version
- Display version on main menu (bottom-right corner)
- Add scripts/bump-version.mjs for patch/minor/major bumps
- Add npm scripts: version:patch, version:minor, version:major
- Update copilot instructions with conventional commit rules,
  version bump workflow, and expanded module documentation
- Bump to v1.1.0

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add seed display and reserve dice to HUD

- Show current game seed below the HUD panel (subtle gray text)
- Show reserve dice in player info (e.g. '7T 24D +3R') when > 0

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix AI discarding unusable active power-ups

When fortify/reinforce can't be used (all neighbors maxed, territory
at max dice, no valid target), AI now discards them instead of leaving
them on the map forever. Also allows fortify to non-frontier neighbors
when no frontier target exists.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Regenerate preview seed each time SetupScene opens

Phaser reuses scene instances, so the field initializer only ran once.
Now previewSeed is refreshed in create(), giving a different map and
game outcome each time.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Never restore mapSeed from localStorage

mapSeed was being persisted and restored, causing every game to use
the same seed. Since there's no UI for entering seeds, always start
fresh with null (which falls through to Date.now() in GameScene).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Don't persist auto-generated map seed to localStorage

Previously the preview seed was saved to preferences, causing every
subsequent game to use the same seed. Now only user-entered seeds
are persisted — auto-generated seeds produce fresh maps each game.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Instant spectate: skip rendering, run pure game logic loop

When spectate mode + instant speed is selected, the entire game
simulates in a tight loop using pure game logic with no UI updates.
Records everything via GameRecorder for replay, then jumps straight
to GameOverScene with full recording and stats.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Phase 10: fix replay map, match history, event unification

- Fix replay by saving serialized initial GameState in recording
  instead of recreating from seed (deterministic replay)
- Add MatchHistory module for localStorage persistence (max 20 matches)
- Add HistoryScene with paginated match list and replay buttons
- Add Match History button to MenuScene
- Unify event systems: GameRecorder as central bus, EventFormatter
  for display text, GameStats.computeFromRecording for analytics
- Remove setupConfig dependency from GameOverScene/ReplayScene
- 238 tests passing

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: add download-index command for pre-built index from GitHub Releases

Users can now get semantic search in ~30 seconds instead of 15-30 minutes:
  npx @jasonbellz/gospel-library-mcp download-index

Downloads index.db from the latest GitHub Release and saves it to
~/.gospel-library-mcp/index.db. Uses atomic write (.tmp + rename)
to avoid corruption if interrupted.

Also:
- Export DB_DIR from vectorStore.ts (needed by downloader)
- Update startup/search fallback messages to suggest download-index first
- Update build-index message to reflect title+description indexing

commit.message:
Add contextual Tips & Tricks section for remaining daily protein goal (#7)

Users had no in-app guidance on how to close the gap between their
current intake and daily protein goal. This adds a dynamic tips section
that surfaces food suggestions calibrated to the remaining amount.

### Changes

- **`index.html`** — New `#tips-section` container placed below Today's
Log; hidden by default via `display:none`
- **`app.js`**
  - `getTips(remaining)` — returns 3 contextual tips across 4 tiers:
    | Remaining | Suggestions |
    |-----------|-------------|
    | ≥ 60g | Chicken breast 200g, tuna + shake combo, meal planning |
    | 30–59g | Whey shake, tuna 100g, Greek yogurt + cottage cheese |
    | 10–29g | Greek yogurt 150g, two eggs, cottage cheese 100g |
    | < 10g | Milk 200ml, one egg, cottage cheese 50g |
- `renderTips()` — shows/hides section based on remaining; hidden once
goal is met
- `render()` now calls `renderTips()` so tips update live on every entry
change
- **`style.css`** — `.tip-item` uses a green left-border accent
(`border-left: 3px solid var(--green-500)`) and reuses existing
surface/text-muted variables; consistent with the log item design

commit.message:
feat: index title + og:description for richer semantic embeddings

Previously only the article title was embedded. Now each document is
indexed as 'Title. Description' using the og:description meta tag,
which contains a meaningful summary of the article content.

This significantly improves semantic search recall — queries about
concepts mentioned only in the article body (not the title) now match
correctly. Existing indexes should be rebuilt with build-index.

Also includes entity decoding for meta tag content (& etc.) and
expanded Range header from 8KB to 16KB to capture longer <head> sections.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* feat(deploy): 3-step save verification, celebratory UX, and focus management

Replace the simple "Configuration saved" message with a progressive
3-step verification sequence after save:
  1. Configuration saved ✅ (re-read project to confirm)
  2. Trigger active ✅ / ⚠️ inconclusive (check deployments API)
  3. Script accessible ✅ (verify project metadata)

Add celebratory confirmation UX with variant text:
  - Fresh deploy: "🎉 Your automation is live!"
  - Edit/re-save: "🎉 Your automation is updated and running."

Add focus management (WCAG 2.1 AA):
  - Focus moves to save-status after save completes
  - Focus moves to error message on config load failure
  - Focus moves to first form element after panel load

Fix parseGmailConfig/parseCalendarConfig returning null for empty
configs by skipping non-config brace blocks (function body braces).

text variants, trigger degradation, focus management, and edit-mode
detection.

* fix(deploy): deduplicate localStorage entries per script in Step 4

Users who deployed the same script multiple times (e.g. with different
titles) had duplicate entries in localStorage, causing Step 4 to render
multiple panels per script — some pointing at stale/deleted project IDs
that returned 404 errors.

getDeployedProjects() now deduplicates by catalogId, keeping only the
last entry per script. Adds a Playwright test confirming 3 localStorage
entries for 2 distinct scripts produce exactly 2 config panels.

Picker dialogs (Doc, Folder, Sheet) open in list view by default.

empty, auto-populate it with the doc's parent folder ID and fetch the
folder name from the Drive API.
